characters.name: James Alston
characters.description: Cool Big Bro: To his younger siblings Shaina and Simeon and his cousin Vanessa.

characters.name: Vanessa Alston
characters.description: Fear of Thunder: She has a fear of thunder and lightning as it was shown in "Lightning is Frightening". Tomboy and Girly Girl: The tomboy to Shaina's girly girl. Tomboy with a Girly Streak: She was stated to be a girly girl in "Please Don't Eat the Alstons". Vocal Evolution: Her speaking voice sounded more older in the fourth season.

characters.name: Shaina Alston
characters.description: Annoying Younger Sibling: She sometimes gets on her cousin Vanessa's nerves. Girly Girl with a Tomboy Streak: She likes to play baseball. Tomboy and Girly Girl: The girly girl to Vanessa's tomboy.

characters.name: Simeon Alston
characters.description: I Got Bigger: The first season shows him as a baby, and the fourth season shows him as a toddler (almost a kid) speaking sentences.

characters.name: Armando
characters.description: Annoying Younger Sibling: He sometimes annoys his big sister Marisol. I Got Bigger: The first season shows him as a kid, and the fourth season shows him as a teenager. Vocal Evolution: His voice got deep in the fourth season.

characters.name: Marisol
characters.description: Cool Big Sis: To his little brother Armando. Put on the Bus: After the second season, she does not appear for the rest of the series.

characters.name: Abuelo
characters.description: The grandfather of Armando and Marisol's.

characters.name: Binyah Binyah Polliwog
characters.description: Animals Not to Scale: He's a pretty big pollywog or frog. Catchphrase: "Binyah Binyah!" or "Binyah Binyah Polliwog!", "Binyah Binyah, uh-oh!" Pokémon Speak:Downplayed. He does lapse into only saying his name, but he can speak normal sentences.

characters.name: Bryan
characters.description: Ascended Extra: Appears in more episodes in the first two seasons of the series. I Got Bigger: The first season shows him as a kid, and the fourth season shows him as a teenager. Kids Love Dinosaurs: He's a dino lover, according to the Season 2 episode "Whose Friend Are You Anyway?" during the song "Jump In, Jump Out". Out of Focus: He only appears in four episodes of the third season and three episodes of the fourth season. Vocal Evolution: His voice got deep in the third season.

characters.name: Jessica
characters.description: Out of Focus: She only appears in three episodes of the third season. Tomboy and Girly Girl: The Girly Girl to Mia's tomboy. Vocal Evolution: She sounded more older in the fourth season.

characters.name: Greg
characters.description: Kids Love Dinosaurs: He loves dinosaurs. He even states that he collects toy dinosaurs.

characters.name: Miguel
characters.description: James' new friend who only appears in "James' New Buddy".

characters.name: Chansome the Pelican
characters.description: Out of Focus: He only appears in two episodes of the fourth season, as compared to only five absences in the third season.
